title: UK Launches Major Meningitis B Vaccination Program for Young People
subtitle: A new effort aims to protect students and school leavers following recent outbreaks of the serious illness.

summary.en: Health officials in the UK are launching a new vaccination program to protect young people against meningitis B. This decision follows a series of unusual outbreaks in Kent, Dorset, and Berkshire. The program targets students finishing their final year of school and those starting university this autumn. Experts emphasize that the vaccine is crucial because university life involves close social contact that helps the bacteria spread. Eligible individuals are encouraged to book their appointments at local pharmacies to receive two doses of the vaccine.
summary.zh: 英國衛生官員正啟動一項新的疫苗接種計畫，以保護年輕人免受 B 型腦膜炎的侵害。此項決定是針對近期在肯特郡、多塞特郡和伯克郡發生的一系列異常疫情所採取的行動。該計畫的目標對象為即將完成最後一年學業的學生，以及今年秋季即將入學的大學生。專家強調，此疫苗至關重要，因為大學生活涉及密切的社交接觸，容易助長細菌傳播。符合資格者受鼓勵向當地藥局預約，以接種兩劑疫苗。

paragraphs.en: Health authorities across the UK have announced a new, one-off vaccination program to protect about one million young people against meningitis B. This decision follows concerns about the largest and fastest-growing outbreak of the disease seen in the UK so far, which occurred in Kent earlier this year. Additionally, officials identified two other unusual clusters of cases in Weymouth, Dorset, and Reading, Berkshire. Together, these events resulted in the deaths of three young people, prompting the government to take immediate action.
paragraphs.zh: 英國各地的衛生當局宣布了一項新的、一次性的疫苗接種計畫，旨在保護約一百萬名年輕人免受 B 型腦膜炎的侵害。此項決定源於對英國迄今為止規模最大、擴散速度最快的疫情之擔憂，該疫情於今年稍早在肯特郡（Kent）爆發。此外，官員還在多塞特郡（Dorset）的韋茅斯（Weymouth）以及伯克郡（Berkshire）的雷丁（Reading）發現了另外兩起異常的群聚感染案例。這些事件總共導致三名年輕人死亡，促使政府立即採取行動。

paragraphs.en: According to the UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA), meningitis B bacteria are often carried in the nose and throat without causing harm. However, in some cases, the bacteria can cause serious infections, including meningitis—an infection of the membranes surrounding the brain and spinal cord—or blood poisoning. The NHS notes that up to one in ten cases of bacterial meningitis can be fatal. Those who survive the illness may face long-term health problems, such as hearing loss or epilepsy.
paragraphs.zh: 根據英國衛生安全局（UKHSA）的說法，B 型腦膜炎細菌常存在於鼻腔和喉嚨中，且通常不會造成傷害。然而，在某些情況下，這些細菌可能引發嚴重感染，包括腦膜炎（即包覆大腦與脊髓的薄膜受到感染）或敗血症。英國國家醫療保健服務（NHS）指出，細菌性腦膜炎的病例中，死亡率最高可達十分之一。倖存者可能會面臨長期的健康問題，例如聽力喪失或癲癇。

paragraphs.en: Health Secretary James Murray explained that the recent outbreaks suggest a possible change in how meningitis B affects the population. While officials continue to study the evidence, they decided to act now to protect those at the highest immediate risk. The program is specifically designed for students finishing their final year of school—Year 13 in England and Wales, Year 14 in Northern Ireland, and S6 in Scotland—as well as young people aged 18 to 25 who are starting university or moving into residential education for the first time this autumn.
paragraphs.zh: 衛生大臣莫瑞（James Murray）解釋說，近期的疫情顯示 B 型腦膜炎對人口的影響方式可能有所改變。儘管官員們仍在研究相關證據，但他們決定立即採取行動，以保護目前風險最高的人群。該計畫專為即將完成最後一年學業的學生設計，包括英格蘭與威爾斯的 13 年級學生、北愛爾蘭的 14 年級學生，以及蘇格蘭的 S6 學生；同時也涵蓋了今年秋季即將進入大學或首次入住學校宿舍的 18 至 25 歲年輕人。

paragraphs.en: Experts note that university students face a higher risk than many of their peers. This is due to several factors, including living in shared accommodation, attending parties, and having large social networks. These conditions make it easier for the bacteria to spread through close contact, such as kissing, sharing drinks, or using the same vapes. The UKHSA also pointed out that cases of this disease typically increase between October and November each year, making it important to provide protection before the new academic term begins.
paragraphs.zh: 專家指出，大學生面臨的風險比許多同齡人更高。這是由於多種因素所致，包括居住在共享宿舍、參加派對以及擁有廣泛的社交圈。這些條件使得細菌更容易透過親密接觸傳播，例如接吻、共用飲料或使用同一支電子菸。英國衛生安全局也指出，該疾病的病例通常在每年 10 月至 11 月間增加，因此在新的學期開始前提供保護至關重要。

paragraphs.en: This new program offers the Bexsero vaccine, which protects against most strains of meningitis B. It requires two doses, given at least 28 days apart. In England, the shots will be available through community pharmacies during July and August. Students will be contacted directly via the NHS app, text, email, or letter. For those starting university for the first time, appointments can be booked directly with pharmacies. International students under the age of 25 are also encouraged to receive their first dose before arriving in the UK, if possible.
paragraphs.zh: 這項新計畫提供 Bexsero 疫苗，該疫苗能預防大多數 B 型腦膜炎菌株。接種此疫苗需要兩劑，且兩劑間隔至少需 28 天。在英格蘭，這些疫苗將於 7 月和 8 月期間透過社區藥局提供。學生將會透過 NHS 應用程式、簡訊、電子郵件或信件直接收到通知。對於首次進入大學的學生，可以直接向藥局預約接種。若情況允許，也鼓勵 25 歲以下的國際學生在抵達英國前先接種第一劑。

paragraphs.en: While the UK has offered a different vaccine, known as MenACWY, to teenagers for years, it does not cover the B strain. Because of this, some parents previously paid for private vaccinations, which can cost £200 or more. The new government-funded program aims to remove this financial barrier. Caroline Temmink, the director of vaccination at NHS England, urged all eligible students to come forward for their doses to gain peace of mind before starting their studies.
paragraphs.zh: 雖然英國多年來一直為青少年提供另一種稱為 MenACWY 的疫苗，但該疫苗並不涵蓋 B 型菌株。因此，有些家長過去曾自費購買私人疫苗，費用可能高達 200 英鎊或更多。這項新的政府資助計畫旨在消除此類經濟障礙。英格蘭 NHS 疫苗接種主任坦明克（Caroline Temmink）呼籲所有符合資格的學生踴躍接種，以便在開始學業前獲得安心保障。

paragraphs.en: The impact of this disease on families is profound. The BBC reported on the story of Aaron Mills, an 18-year-old student who died from meningitis in January 2026. His parents shared that they were confused when they learned of his diagnosis, as they believed he had been vaccinated. They later discovered that the vaccine he received as a child did not cover the specific strain that caused his illness. His mother described the pain of losing him as "unbearable," highlighting why health officials are now prioritizing this wider protection.
paragraphs.zh: 這種疾病對家庭造成的影響深遠。BBC 報導了 18 歲學生米爾斯（Aaron Mills）的故事，他在 2026 年 1 月因腦膜炎去世。他的父母表示，當得知他的診斷結果時感到非常困惑，因為他們以為他已經接種過疫苗。後來他們才發現，他小時候接種的疫苗並不包含導致他患病的特定菌株。他的母親形容失去兒子的痛苦「難以承受」，這也凸顯了為何衛生官員現在將這種更廣泛的保護措施列為優先事項。

paragraphs.en: Each nation in the UK is managing the rollout slightly differently. In Wales, the program will run from July to December, with health boards contacting 17 and 18-year-olds directly. Similar efforts are beginning in Scotland and Northern Ireland. By providing these two doses before the autumn, health officials hope to reduce the risk of serious illness and prevent larger outbreaks as thousands of young people begin a new chapter in their lives.
paragraphs.zh: 英國境內的各個國家在推動此計畫的方式上略有不同。在威爾斯，該計畫將於 7 月至 12 月間執行，由衛生委員會直接聯繫 17 和 18 歲的青少年。蘇格蘭和北愛爾蘭也正在展開類似的行動。透過在秋季前提供這兩劑疫苗，衛生官員希望能在成千上萬的年輕人開啟人生新篇章之際，降低嚴重疾病的風險並防止更大規模的疫情爆發。

keyTerms.definitionEn: Groups of similar things occurring closely together in time or place.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（聚集），這裡作名詞，指特定地區出現的一連串病例。文中：Additionally, officials identified two other unusual clusters of cases in Weymouth, Dorset, and Reading, Berkshire.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To offer help or to present oneself for a specific purpose.
keyTerms.noteZh: 由動詞與介詞組成，意思非字面直譯，指主動前往接種疫苗。文中：Caroline Temmink, the director of vaccination at NHS England, urged all eligible students to come forward for their doses to gain peace of mind before starting their studies.

keyTerms.definitionEn: Specific versions or varieties of a virus or bacteria.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（拉緊、使勁），這裡作名詞，指病原體的不同類型。文中：This new program offers the Bexsero vaccine, which protects against most strains of meningitis B.

keyTerms.definitionEn: The official introduction or launch of a new product or service.
keyTerms.definitionZh: （新政策、計畫的）正式推出、啟動。
keyTerms.noteZh: 由動詞片語 roll out 轉化而來的名詞，指計畫的執行過程。文中：Each nation in the UK is managing the rollout slightly differently.

sources.name: BBC Health
sources.title: Meningitis B vaccine to be offered to a million young people

sources.name: The Guardian Health
sources.title: UK school leavers and new students to be offered meningitis B vaccine

quiz.question: According to the article, which group of people is the new vaccination program specifically intended for?

options.A: All citizens under the age of 25 living in the UK.
options.B: Students finishing their final year of secondary school and those aged 18-25 starting residential education.
options.C: Only university students who have previously been diagnosed with meningitis B.
options.D: Young people living in Kent, Weymouth, and Reading.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第三段，該計畫明確針對「即將完成最後一年學業的學生」以及「18至25歲首次進入大學或居住型教育機構的年輕人」。選項 A 範圍過大，未包含所有 25 歲以下公民；選項 C 錯誤，文中未提到僅限已確診者；選項 D 僅提到疫情爆發點，並非該計畫的唯一適用對象。

quiz.question: What can be inferred about the reason why some parents previously paid for private meningitis B vaccinations?

options.A: They were unaware that the NHS offered free vaccinations for other strains.
options.B: They wanted their children to receive the vaccine before the autumn term started.
options.C: They were concerned that the standard NHS-provided vaccines did not protect against the B strain.
options.D: They believed that the MenACWY vaccine was ineffective for teenagers.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據第六段與第七段，文中提到現有的 MenACWY 疫苗並不包含 B 型流腦，而 Aaron Mills 的案例也顯示家長因孩子接種的疫苗未涵蓋該菌株而感到困惑。由此可推論，家長支付私立費用是為了獲得 MenACWY 以外的額外保護。選項 A 文中未提及；選項 B 是本次計畫的考量，而非過去家長自費的原因；選項 D 錯誤，文中僅說 MenACWY 不含 B 型，未稱其無效。

quiz.question: In the final paragraph, what does the phrase 'a new chapter in their lives' most likely refer to?

options.A: The process of recovering from a serious illness.
options.B: The transition to university or higher education.
options.C: The experience of getting vaccinated for the first time.
options.D: The change in government policy regarding healthcare.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。在文中語境下，這句話出現在討論年輕人即將進入大學或居住型教育機構的段落之後，象徵著學生從中學畢業進入高等教育階段的轉變。選項 A 與疾病康復無關；選項 C 僅是該階段的一項準備工作，並非「新篇章」的本質意義；選項 D 則是指代政府政策，與年輕人的個人生命歷程描述不符。

quiz.question: What is the primary purpose of this article?

options.A: To explain the biological causes and symptoms of meningitis B.
options.B: To criticize the government for failing to provide vaccines sooner.
options.C: To describe the tragic story of Aaron Mills and his family.
options.D: To inform the public about a new, government-funded vaccination program for young people.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 D。整篇文章的核心在於介紹英國政府為應對疫情，針對特定年齡層推動的 Bexsero 疫苗計畫。選項 A 僅是背景資訊，非文章主旨；選項 B 文中並無批評語氣；選項 C 僅是文章中用以強調計畫重要性的一個案例，並非整篇文章的主題。文章旨在傳遞公共衛生資訊，協助目標群體了解如何獲取疫苗。
